critical_failures.description: Generated output identifies parties other than Zhang Jianguo as claimant/lender and Li Haitao as defendant/borrower.
Generated output does not preserve the principal facts: loan amount 200000, repayment 20000, remaining principal 180000.
Generated output does not preserve the loan and transfer date of 2023-05-10.
Generated output does not preserve the due date of 2023-11-10.
Generated output omits core evidence for loan agreement, fund transfer, repayment, debt acknowledgment, or demand letter service.
Generated document outputs are placeholders or empty summaries rather than case-specific legal work product.
